data.name: UNAUTHORIZED
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: CONFLICT
data.value: This request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

data.name: BAD_REQUEST
data.value: The request could not be processed.

data.name: INTERNAL_ERROR
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
data.value: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

data.name: REQUEST_TIMEOUT
data.value: The request timed out. Please try again.

data.name: TEXT_USER_ID_NOT_FOUND_IN_TOKEN
data.value: User ID not found in token.

data.name: TEXT_USER_ID_AND_TOKEN_ARE_REQUIRED
data.value: User ID and Token are required.

data.name: TEXT_PAGE_NUMBER_AND_PAGESIZE_MUST_BE_GREATER_THAN_0
data.value: pageNumber and pageSize must be greater than 0.

data.name: TEXT_FIRST_NAME_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_2_AND_50_CHARACTERS
data.value: First name must be between 2 and 50 characters.

data.name: TEXT_LAST_NAME_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_2_AND_50_CHARACTERS
data.value: Last name must be between 2 and 50 characters.

data.name: TEXT_PASSWORD_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_8_AND_100_CHARACTERS
data.value: Password must be between 8 and 100 characters.

data.name: TEXT_PASSWORD_AND_CONFIRMATION_PASSWORD_DO_NOT_MATCH
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: TEXT_DATE_OF_BIRTH_MUST_REPRESENT_AN_AGE_BETWEEN_13_AND_120_YEARS
data.value: Date of birth must represent an age between 13 and 120 years.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_SUBMITTED_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" has been submitted successfully and is now pending admin verification. This process may take up to 24 hours. We'll notify you once it's approved.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_UPDATED_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" has been updated and its status is now set back to pending. The admin will re-verify it, which may take up to 24 hours. We'll notify you once it's approved.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_DELETED_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" has been deleted successfully. If this was a mistake or you'd like to restore it, please contact our support team for assistance.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_ACCEPTED_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" has been approved and is now visible to renters.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_REJECTED_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" was rejected during admin verification. Please review your property details and submit it again.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_REJECTED_WITH_REASON_BODY
data.value: Your property "{0}" was rejected during admin verification. Reason: {1}

data.name: NOTIFICATION_RATING_UPDATED_BODY
data.value: A user has updated their rating to {0} stars on your property "{1}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_NEW_RATING_BODY
data.value: A user has rated your property with {0} stars: "{1}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_NEW_COMMENT_BODY
data.value: A user has left a new comment on your property "{0}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_COMMENT_UPDATED_BODY
data.value: A user has updated their comment on your property "{0}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROFILE_UPDATED_BODY
data.value:
Your profile has been updated successfully. Our team will review your information, and your account is expected to be verified within approximately 24 hours.
Once verified, you’ll be able to start renting properties, listing your own, and connecting with compatible roommates.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_WELCOME_TITLE
data.value: Welcome to Your New Home Journey {0}!

data.name: NOTIFICATION_WELCOME_BODY
data.value:
We’re excited to have you on board! To get started, please complete your profile. This will allow you to explore rental opportunities, list your first property, and connect with suitable roommates.
Don’t forget to set your roommate preferences in your profile to improve your matching experience and find the best fit for you.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PASSWORD_RESET_BODY
data.value:
Hello {0}, your password has been updated successfully. You can now log in with your new credentials.
If you didn't make this change, please contact our support team immediately to secure your account.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT_READY_BODY
data.value: The owner of "{0}" has generated a contract for you. Please review and sign it.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT_SIGNED_BODY
data.value: The renter {0} has signed the contract for "{1}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT_CANCELLED_BY_RENTER_BODY
data.value: The renter has cancelled the pending contract for "{0}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONTRACT_CANCELLED_BY_OWNER_BODY
data.value: The owner has cancelled the pending contract for "{0}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ADMIN_CONTRACT_CANCELLED_BODY
data.value: An admin has cancelled contract #{0} for "{1}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_RECEIVED_BODY
data.value:
You have received a payment of {0} {1} for "{2}". This payment is for the due date {3}.
You can withdraw this amount after {4}.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_SUCCESSFUL_BODY
data.value: Your payment of {0} {1} for "{2}" has been successful. This payment is for the due date {3}.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_FAILED_BODY
data.value: Your payment for "{0}" has failed. Please try again.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONNECT_SUCCESS_BODY
data.value: Your Stripe Connect account has been activated and is now ready to withdraw your payments.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_CONNECT_FAILED_BODY
data.value: Your Stripe Connect account is not fully activated. Please complete the onboarding process to enable charges and payouts.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_WITHDRAW_SUCCESS_BODY
data.value: A withdrawal of {0} {1} has been initiated to your connected account. It should reflect in your bank account within a few business days.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_WITHDRAW_FAILED_BODY
data.value: A withdrawal of {0} {1} to your connected account has failed. Please check your Stripe dashboard for details.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_UPCOMING_PAYMENT_BODY
data.value: Your payment of {0} {1} for "{2}" is now available and can be paid. {3} day(s) left until the due date {4}.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_DUE_TODAY_BODY
data.value: Your payment of {0} {1} for "{2}" is due today.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_OVERDUE_BODY
data.value:
Your payment of {0} {1} for "{2}" is overdue. You are {3} day(s) past the due date.
Please complete the payment as soon as possible to avoid any service interruption or further actions in accordance with our terms. If you have any issues, please contact support.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PAYMENT_AVAILABLE_FOR_WITHDRAWAL_BODY
data.value: Your payment of {0} {1} from contract "{2}" that paid at {3} is now available for withdrawal.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_BOOKING_REQUEST_BODY
data.value: You have received a new booking request for "{0}" from {1}.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_BOOKING_REJECTED_BODY
data.value: Your booking request for "{0}" was rejected by the owner.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_BOOKING_CANCELLED_BODY
data.value: The booking request for "{0}" was cancelled by the renter.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_NEW_MESSAGE_BODY
data.value: You have a new message from {0}

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_RESTORED_BODY
data.value: An admin has restored your property "{0}" and made it active again.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_PROPERTY_DEACTIVATED_BODY
data.value: An admin has deactivated your property "{0}". It is no longer publicly available.

data.name: EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_BODY
data.value: Thank you for registering. Please confirm your email by clicking the button below.

data.name: EMAIL_ACCOUNT_CREATED_BODY
data.value: Your account has been successfully created and your email is confirmed.

data.name: EMAIL_RESEND_CONFIRMATION_BODY
data.value: You requested a new email confirmation link. Please confirm your email by clicking the button below.

data.name: EMAIL_RESET_PASSWORD_BODY
data.value: You requested a Reset Password link. Please reset your password by clicking the button below.

data.name: EMAIL_RESET_PASSWORD_EXPIRY
data.value: This link will expire in 1 hour.

data.name: EMAIL_ACCOUNT_DELETION_BODY_1
data.value: Your account has been successfully deleted from our platform.

data.name: EMAIL_ACCOUNT_DELETION_BODY_2
data.value: If this action was not intended or you would like to restore your account or create a new one using the same email address, please contact our support team.

data.name: EMAIL_TWO_FACTOR_BODY
data.value: Use the verification code below to complete your sign-in.

data.name: EMAIL_TWO_FACTOR_EXPIRY
data.value: This code will expire in 5 minutes.

data.name: EMAIL_TWO_FACTOR_IGNORE
data.value: If you did not request this code, please ignore this email.

data.name: AUTH_USER_ID_MISSING
data.value: User ID not found in token.

data.name: USER_ID_AND_TOKEN_REQUIRED
data.value: User ID and token are required.

data.name: INVALID_PAGINATION
data.value: pageNumber and pageSize must be greater than 0.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_REPORT_REFLECTS_THE_CURRENT_ADMIN_SNAPSHOT_AND_THE_SELECTED_PERIOD_CONTEXT_0
data.value: This report reflects the current admin snapshot and the selected period context: {0}.

data.name: TEXT_STORED_REPORT_FILE_WAS_NOT_FOUND_ON_DISK
data.value: Stored report file was not found on disk.

data.name: TEXT_CSV_EXPORTS_SUPPORT_OVERVIEW_USERS_PROPERTIES_CONTRACTS_AND_REVENUE_SCOPES_INDIVIDUALLY_USE_PDF_FOR_THE_FULL_COMBINED_REPORT
data.value: CSV exports support overview, users, properties, contracts, and revenue scopes individually. Use PDF for the full combined report.

data.name: TEXT_FAILED_TO_LOAD_DASHBOARD_OVERVIEW_DATA
data.value: Failed to load dashboard overview data.

data.name: TEXT_CUSTOM_PERIOD_REQUIRES_FROMUTC_AND_TOUTC
data.value: Custom period requires fromUtc and toUtc.

data.name: TEXT_FROMUTC_MUST_BE_EARLIER_THAN_TOUTC
data.value: fromUtc must be earlier than toUtc.

data.name: TEXT_UPDATE_PROFILE_DATA_FAILED_AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_SAVING_ROOMMATE_PREFERENCES
data.value: Update Profile Data failed. An error occurred while saving roommate preferences.

data.name: TEXT_CURRENT_PASSWORD_AND_THE_NEW_PASSWORD_IS_THE_SAME
data.value: Current password and the new password is the same

data.name: TEXT_CHANGE_PASSWORD_FAILED_AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_CHANGING_THE_PASSWORD
data.value: Change Password failed. An error occurred while Changing the password.

data.name: TEXT_USER_HAS_ACTIVE_CONTRACTS_AND_CANNOT_BE_DELETED
data.value: User has active contracts and cannot be deleted

data.name: TEXT_AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_DELETING_THE_USER_ALL_CHANGES_HAVE_BEEN_ROLLED_BACK
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the user. All changes have been rolled back.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_PAYMENT_IS_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE_BECAUSE_THE_CONTRACT_HAS_BEEN_CANCELLED
data.value: This payment is no longer available because the contract has been cancelled.

data.name: TEXT_PAYMENT_CAN_ONLY_BE_MADE_WITHIN_7_DAYS_OF_THE_DUE_DATE
data.value: Payment can only be made within 7 days of the due date.

data.name: TEXT_FAILED_TO_SAVE_STRIPE_ACCOUNT_PLEASE_TRY_AGAIN
data.value: Failed to save Stripe account. Please try again.

data.name: TEXT_STRIPE_ACCOUNT_NOT_CONNECTED_PLEASE_CONNECT_YOUR_STRIPE_ACCOUNT_FIRST
data.value: Stripe account not connected. Please connect your Stripe account first.

data.name: TEXT_STRIPE_ACCOUNT_NOT_FULLY_ACTIVATED_PLEASE_COMPLETE_THE_ONBOARDING_PROCESS_TO_ENABLE_CHARGES_AND_PAYOUTS
data.value: Stripe account not fully activated. Please complete the onboarding process to enable charges and payouts.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_CAN_ONLY_UPLOAD_A_MAXIMUM_OF_10_IMAGES_INCLUDING_THE_PRIMARY_IMAGE
data.value: You can only upload a maximum of 10 images including the primary image.

data.name: TEXT_YOUR_ACCOUNT_MUST_BE_VERIFIED_TO_ADD_A_PROPERTY
data.value: Your account must be verified to add a property.

data.name: TEXT_YOUR_ACCOUNT_MUST_BE_VERIFIED_TO_EDIT_A_PROPERTY
data.value: Your account must be verified to edit a property.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_CANNOT_ADD_MORE_THAN_10_IMAGES_AT_ONCE
data.value: You cannot add more than 10 images at once.

data.name: TEXT_CANNOT_EDIT_A_PROPERTY_THAT_HAS_AN_ACTIVE_CONTRACT
data.value: Cannot edit a property that has an active contract.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_HAS_ACTIVE_CONTRACTS_AND_CANNOT_BE_DELETED
data.value: Property has active contracts and cannot be deleted.

data.name: TEXT_ACCOUNT_IS_LOCKED_TRY_AGAIN_LATER
data.value: Account is locked. Try again later.

data.name: TEXT_REGISTRATION_SUCCESSFUL_PLEASE_CONFIRM_YOUR_EMAIL
data.value: Registration successful. Please confirm your email.

data.name: TEXT_FAILED_TO_CONFIRM_EMAIL_USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Failed to Confirm Email: User not found.

data.name: TEXT_IF_THE_EMAIL_EXISTS_AND_NOT_CONFIRMED_A_CONFIRMATION_EMAIL_HAS_BEEN_SENT_PLEASE_CHECK_YOUR_INBOX
data.value: If the email exists and not confirmed, a confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: TEXT_IF_THE_EMAIL_EXISTS_A_RESET_LINK_WAS_SENT
data.value: If the email exists, a reset link was sent.

data.name: TEXT_ROOMMATE_MATCHING_PREFERENCES_NOT_FOUND_OR_DISABLED
data.value: Roommate matching preferences not found or disabled.

data.name: TEXT_CANNOT_SEND_MESSAGES_TO_A_BANNED_USER
data.value: Cannot send messages to a banned user.

data.name: TEXT_CANNOT_SEND_MESSAGE_TO_A_DELETED_USER
data.value: Cannot send message to a deleted user

data.name: TEXT_BANNED_ACCOUNTS_CANNOT_CREATE_BOOKING_REQUESTS
data.value: Banned accounts cannot create booking requests.

data.name: TEXT_USER_ACCOUNT_MUST_BE_VERIFIED_TO_ADD_A_BOOKING_REQUEST
data.value: User account must be verified to add a booking request.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_IS_NOT_PUBLICLY_AVAILABLE_FOR_BOOKING
data.value: Property is not publicly available for booking.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_IS_FULL_AND_HAS_NO_AVAILABLE_SPOTS
data.value: Property is full and has no available spots.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_IS_NOT_AVAILABLE_AS_IT_IS_ALREADY_OCCUPIED
data.value: Property is not available as it is already occupied.

data.name: TEXT_START_AND_END_DATE_MUST_ALIGN_WITH_THE_RENTAL_DURATION_UNIT_E_G_COMPLETE_MONTHS_YEARS
data.value: Start and end date must align with the rental duration unit (e.g. complete months/years).

data.name: BOOKING_DAILY_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY_INVALID
data.value: For daily rentals, only '{0}' payment frequency is allowed.

data.name: BOOKING_MONTHLY_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY_INVALID
data.value: For monthly rentals, only '{0}' or '{1}' payment frequencies are allowed.

data.name: TEXT_UNAUTHORIZED_TO_CANCEL_OR_REJECT_THIS_BOOKING_REQUEST
data.value: Unauthorized to cancel or reject this booking request.

data.name: TEXT_UNAUTHORIZED_TO_START_A_CHAT_FOR_THIS_BOOKING_REQUEST
data.value: Unauthorized to start a chat for this booking request.

data.name: TEXT_FAILED_TO_SEND_THE_INITIAL_CHAT_MESSAGE
data.value: Failed to send the initial chat message.

data.name: TEXT_HELLO_I_AM_CONTACTING_YOU_REGARDING_THE_BOOKING_REQUEST_FOR_THE_PROPERTY_0
data.value: Hello! I am contacting you regarding the booking request for the property '{0}'.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_ARE_NOT_ALLOWED_TO_RATE_OR_COMMENT_ON_THIS_PROPERTY
data.value: You are not allowed to rate or comment on this property

data.name: TEXT_YOU_ARE_NOT_ALLOWED_TO_EDIT_THIS_COMMENT
data.value: You are not allowed to edit this comment

data.name: TEXT_YOU_ARE_NOT_ALLOWED_TO_DELETE_THIS_COMMENT
data.value: You are not allowed to delete this comment

data.name: USER_VERIFICATION_APPROVAL_STATUS_CONFLICT
data.value: User verification cannot be approved while account status is {0}.

data.name: USER_VERIFICATION_DECLINE_STATUS_CONFLICT
data.value: User verification cannot be declined while account status is {0}.

data.name: PROPERTY_VERIFICATION_APPROVAL_STATUS_CONFLICT
data.value: Property verification cannot be approved while property status is {0}.

data.name: PROPERTY_VERIFICATION_DECLINE_STATUS_CONFLICT
data.value: Property verification cannot be declined while property status is {0}.

data.name: TEXT_DELETED_USERS_CANNOT_BE_RESTORED_FROM_BAN
data.value: Deleted users cannot be restored from ban.

data.name: TEXT_ONLY_BANNED_USERS_CAN_BE_RESTORED
data.value: Only banned users can be restored.

data.name: TEXT_ADMIN_USERS_CANNOT_BE_MANAGED_FROM_THIS_ENDPOINT
data.value: Admin users cannot be managed from this endpoint.

data.name: TEXT_AT_LEAST_ONE_ROLE_MUST_REMAIN_ASSIGNED
data.value: At least one role must remain assigned.

data.name: TEXT_THE_LAST_ADMIN_CANNOT_BE_REMOVED
data.value: The last admin cannot be removed.

data.name: TEXT_REVIEW_STATUS_MUST_BE_RESOLVED_OR_REJECTED
data.value: Review status must be Resolved or Rejected.

data.name: TEXT_REJECTED_REPORTS_CANNOT_APPLY_A_MODERATION_ACTION
data.value: Rejected reports cannot apply a moderation action.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_REPORT_HAS_ALREADY_BEEN_REVIEWED
data.value: This report has already been reviewed.

data.name: TEXT_THE_REPORTED_USER_OR_RESPONSIBLE_ACTOR_NO_LONGER_EXISTS
data.value: The reported user or responsible actor no longer exists.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_REPORT_DOES_NOT_CONTAIN_A_VALID_PROPERTY_TARGET
data.value: This report does not contain a valid property target.

data.name: TEXT_THE_REPORTED_PROPERTY_NO_LONGER_EXISTS
data.value: The reported property no longer exists.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_REPORT_DOES_NOT_CONTAIN_A_VALID_MESSAGE_TARGET
data.value: This report does not contain a valid message target.

data.name: TEXT_THE_REPORTED_MESSAGE_NO_LONGER_EXISTS
data.value: The reported message no longer exists.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_REPORT_DOES_NOT_CONTAIN_A_VALID_PROPERTY_COMMENT_TARGET
data.value: This report does not contain a valid property comment target.

data.name: TEXT_THE_REPORTED_PROPERTY_COMMENT_NO_LONGER_EXISTS
data.value: The reported property comment no longer exists.

data.name: TEXT_REASON_MUST_BE_AT_LEAST_5_CHARACTERS_LONG
data.value: Reason must be at least 5 characters long.

data.name: TEXT_USER_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_GUID_TARGET_ID
data.value: User reports require a valid GUID target ID.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_CANNOT_REPORT_YOUR_OWN_ACCOUNT
data.value: You cannot report your own account.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_NUMERIC_TARGET_ID
data.value: Property reports require a valid numeric target ID.

data.name: TEXT_MESSAGE_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_GUID_TARGET_ID
data.value: Message reports require a valid GUID target ID.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_CAN_ONLY_REPORT_MESSAGES_THAT_BELONG_TO_YOUR_CONVERSATION
data.value: You can only report messages that belong to your conversation.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_COMMENT_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_NUMERIC_TARGET_ID
data.value: Property comment reports require a valid numeric target ID.

data.name: TEXT_REPORTED_PROPERTY_COMMENT_WAS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Reported property comment was not found.

data.name: REPORT_GUID_TARGET_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: {0} reports require a valid GUID target ID.

data.name: REPORT_NUMERIC_TARGET_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: {0} reports require a valid positive numeric target ID.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_ARE_NOT_THE_OWNER_OF_THIS_PROPERTY
data.value: You are not the owner of this property.

data.name: TEXT_THIS_PROPERTY_ALREADY_HAS_AN_ACTIVE_OR_PENDING_CONTRACT
data.value: This property already has an active or pending contract.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_ARE_NOT_THE_DESIGNATED_RENTER_FOR_THIS_CONTRACT
data.value: You are not the designated renter for this contract.

data.name: TEXT_BANNED_ACCOUNTS_CANNOT_SIGN_NEW_CONTRACTS
data.value: Banned accounts cannot sign new contracts.

data.name: CONTRACT_SIGN_STATUS_INVALID
data.value: Contract is in {0} status. Only Pending contracts can be signed.

data.name: CONTRACT_PDF_REQUIRED_DATA_MISSING
data.value: Contract generation failed: Missing required data ({0}).

data.name: TEXT_AN_UNEXPECTED_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_GENERATING_THE_CONTRACT_DOCUMENT
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the contract document.

data.name: TEXT_AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_WHILE_SAVING_THE_CONTRACT_AND_GENERATING_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_PLEASE_TRY_AGAIN
data.value: An error occurred while saving the contract and generating payment schedules. Please try again.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_DO_NOT_HAVE_ACCESS_TO_VIEW_THIS_CONTRACT
data.value: You do not have access to view this contract.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_DO_NOT_HAVE_ACCESS_TO_THIS_CONTRACT
data.value: You do not have access to this contract.

data.name: TEXT_ORIGINAL_CONTRACT_VERIFIED_BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHORING_IS_STILL_IN_PROGRESS
data.value: Original contract verified. Blockchain anchoring is still in progress.

data.name: TEXT_ORIGINAL_CONTRACT_VERIFIED_AND_ANCHORED_ON_BITCOIN
data.value: Original contract verified and anchored on Bitcoin.

data.name: TEXT_YOU_DO_NOT_HAVE_ACCESS_TO_CANCEL_THIS_CONTRACT
data.value: You do not have access to cancel this contract.

data.name: AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
data.value: Authentication is required to access this endpoint.

data.name: ACCESS_TOKEN_INVALID
data.value: The access token is invalid or malformed.

data.name: ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRED
data.value: The access token has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: ACCESS_FORBIDDEN
data.value: You do not have permission to access this endpoint.

data.name: ACCOUNT_BANNED_ACCESS_DENIED
data.value: Banned accounts cannot access this endpoint.

data.name: VALIDATION_EMAIL_ADDRESS
data.value: {0} must be a valid email address.

data.name: VALIDATION_PHONE_NUMBER
data.value: {0} must be a valid phone number.

data.name: VALIDATION_INVALID_JSON
data.value: The request body contains invalid JSON.

data.name: TEXT_EMAIL_NOT_CONFIRMED_PLEASE_CHECK_YOUR_EMAIL_FOR_CONFIRMATION_INSTRUCTIONS
data.value: Email not confirmed. Please check your email for confirmation instructions.

data.name: TEXT_ACCOUNT_HAS_BEEN_BANNED_CONTACT_SUPPORT_FOR_ASSISTANCE
data.value: Account has been banned. Contact support for assistance.

data.name: TEXT_ACCOUNT_HAS_BEEN_DELETED_CONTACT_SUPPORT_FOR_ASSISTANCE
data.value: Account has been deleted. Contact support for assistance.

data.name: TEXT_FAILED_TO_SEND_YOUR_SUPPORT_REQUEST_AT_THE_MOMENT_PLEASE_TRY_AGAIN_LATER
data.value: Failed to send your support request at the moment. Please try again later.

data.name: TEXT_REPORT_REASON_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_5_AND_2000_CHARACTERS
data.value: Report reason must be between 5 and 2000 characters.

data.name: TEXT_0_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_GUID_TARGET_ID
data.value: {0} reports require a valid GUID target ID.

data.name: TEXT_0_REPORTS_REQUIRE_A_VALID_POSITIVE_NUMERIC_TARGET_ID
data.value: {0} reports require a valid positive numeric target ID.

data.name: TEXT_ARABIC_ADDRESS_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_10_AND_200_CHARACTERS
data.value: Arabic address must be between 10 and 200 characters.

data.name: TEXT_ARABIC_FULL_NAME_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_10_AND_100_CHARACTERS
data.value: Arabic Full Name must be between 10 and 100 characters.

data.name: TEXT_COMMENT_CONTENT_MUST_BE_BETWEEN_1_AND_1000_CHARACTERS
data.value: Comment content must be between 1 and 1000 characters.

data.name: TEXT_CONTRACT_GENERATION_FAILED_MISSING_REQUIRED_DATA_0
data.value: Contract generation failed: Missing required data ({0}).

data.name: TEXT_CONTRACT_IS_IN_0_STATUS_ONLY_PENDING_CONTRACTS_CAN_BE_SIGNED
data.value: Contract is in {0} status. Only Pending contracts can be signed.

data.name: TEXT_FOR_DAILY_RENTALS_ONLY_0_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY_IS_ALLOWED
data.value: For daily rentals, only '{0}' payment frequency is allowed.

data.name: TEXT_FOR_MONTHLY_RENTALS_ONLY_0_OR_1_PAYMENT_FREQUENCIES_ARE_ALLOWED
data.value: For monthly rentals, only '{0}' or '{1}' payment frequencies are allowed.

data.name: TEXT_INVALID_PERIOD_SUPPORTED_VALUES_ARE_ALLTIME_THISMONTH_THISYEAR_AND_CUSTOM
data.value: Invalid period. Supported values are allTime, thisMonth, thisYear, and custom.

data.name: TEXT_NATIONAL_ID_NUMBER_MUST_BE_14_CHARACTERS
data.value: National ID Number must be 14 characters.

data.name: TEXT_ONLY_PENDING_OR_ACTIVE_CONTRACTS_CAN_BE_CANCELLED_BY_ADMIN
data.value: Only pending or active contracts can be cancelled by admin.

data.name: TEXT_PAGENUMBER_AND_PAGESIZE_MUST_BE_GREATER_THAN_0
data.value: pageNumber and pageSize must be greater than 0.

data.name: TEXT_PASSWORD_MUST_BE_AT_LEAST_6_CHARACTERS
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_VERIFICATION_CANNOT_BE_APPROVED_WHILE_PROPERTY_STATUS_IS_0
data.value: Property verification cannot be approved while property status is {0}.

data.name: TEXT_PROPERTY_VERIFICATION_CANNOT_BE_DECLINED_WHILE_PROPERTY_STATUS_IS_0
data.value: Property verification cannot be declined while property status is {0}.

data.name: TEXT_USER_VERIFICATION_CANNOT_BE_APPROVED_WHILE_ACCOUNT_STATUS_IS_0
data.value: User verification cannot be approved while account status is {0}.

data.name: TEXT_USER_VERIFICATION_CANNOT_BE_DECLINED_WHILE_ACCOUNT_STATUS_IS_0
data.value: User verification cannot be declined while account status is {0}.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ACCOUNT_BANNED_BODY
data.value: An admin has banned your account. You can no longer use MARN until the ban is removed. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ACCOUNT_UNBANNED_BODY
data.value: An admin has removed the ban from your account. You can now sign in and continue using MARN.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ACCOUNT_RESTORED_BODY
data.value: An admin has restored your deleted account. You can now sign in and continue using MARN.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ACCOUNT_RESTORED_REVERIFY_BODY
data.value: An admin has restored your account. Some verification images were removed during the deletion grace period, so you may need to resubmit them before your account can be verified again.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ACCOUNT_DELETED_BODY
data.value: An admin has deleted your account. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ADMIN_PROPERTY_DELETED_BODY
data.value: An admin has deleted your property "{0}". If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ADMIN_PROPERTY_RESTORED_BODY
data.value: An admin has restored your deleted property "{0}". It is available in your account again.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_ADMIN_PROPERTY_RESTORED_REVERIFY_BODY
data.value: An admin has restored your property "{0}". Its ownership files were already removed during the deletion grace period, so it may need to go through verification again.

data.name: ONLY_DELETED_PROPERTIES_CAN_BE_RESTORED
data.value: Only deleted properties can be restored.

data.name: TEXT_ONLY_DELETED_PROPERTIES_CAN_BE_RESTORED
data.value: Only deleted properties can be restored.

data.name: ONLY_DELETED_USERS_CAN_BE_RESTORED
data.value: Only deleted users can be restored.

data.name: TEXT_ONLY_DELETED_USERS_CAN_BE_RESTORED
data.value: Only deleted users can be restored.

data.name: ZZ_TWO_FACTOR_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
data.value: Two-factor authentication is required. A verification code has been sent to your email.

data.name: ZZ_REGISTRATION_SUCCESSFUL
data.value: Registration completed successfully. Please confirm your email.

data.name: ZZ_CONFIRMATION_EMAIL_RESEND_REQUEST_PROCESSED
data.value: If the email exists and is not confirmed, a confirmation email has been sent.

data.name: ZZ_PASSWORD_RESET_LINK_REQUEST_PROCESSED
data.value: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

data.name: ZZ_ADMIN_CONTRACT_PAYMENT_INTENTS_CLEARED_FOR_CANCELLATION
data.value: All related payment intents were cleared successfully for contract cancellation.

data.name: ZZ_ADMIN_MANAGEABLE_USER_RESOLVED_SUCCESSFULLY
data.value: Target user resolved successfully for admin management.

data.name: ZZ_BOOKING_REQUEST_CHAT_STARTED_SUCCESSFULLY
data.value: Chat started successfully for the booking request.

data.name: ZZ_CONTRACT_VERIFICATION_TAMPERING_DETECTED
data.value: Contract verification completed. The uploaded file does not match the original contract.

data.name: ZZ_CONTRACT_VERIFIED_PENDING_BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHORING
data.value: Contract verified successfully. Blockchain anchoring is still in progress.

data.name: ZZ_CONTRACT_VERIFIED_AND_ANCHORED
data.value: Contract verified successfully and anchored on the blockchain.

data.name: ZZ_EXISTING_PAYMENT_INTENT_CLIENT_SECRET_RETURNED
data.value: Existing payment intent client secret returned successfully.

data.name: ZZ_PAYMENT_INTENT_CLIENT_SECRET_CREATED_SUCCESSFULLY
data.value: Payment intent client secret created successfully.

data.name: ZZ_TEST_PLATFORM_BALANCE_TOPPED_UP_SUCCESSFULLY
data.value: Test platform balance topped up successfully.

data.name: ZZ_PROPERTY_UNSAVED_SUCCESSFULLY
data.value: Property removed from saved list successfully.

data.name: ZZ_PROPERTY_FEEDBACK_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: You have already submitted feedback for this property.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_NEW_FEEDBACK_BODY
data.value: A user has left {0}-star feedback on your property "{1}".

data.name: NOTIFICATION_FEEDBACK_UPDATED_BODY
data.value: A user has updated their feedback to {0} stars on your property "{1}".
